Collection Four

Scented Candles

Hand-poured in Abuja, Nigeria with care. Slow-burning, beautifully fragranced, presented in frosted vessels with copper lids. Available in 220g, 300g and 500g.

Seranade · Signature

Signature Range

Available Fragrances

Ten carefully crafted scent stories — each available across the full product range.

01
Golden Myst
Vanilla · Oud

Rich, warm, and grounding — a deep oud wrapped in smooth vanilla. The scent of quiet opulence.

02
Sweet Affair
Strawberry · Vanilla

Playful and indulgent. Bright strawberry melts into a warm vanilla base — irresistible from first breath.

03
Lavender Bliss
Lavender · Jasmine

Calming lavender meets delicate jasmine in a fragrance that soothes the mind and lifts the spirit.

04
Mocha Dream
Chocolate · Vanilla

Comforting and rich. Chocolate and vanilla create a cosy gourmand atmosphere that feels like a warm embrace.

05
Calm & Dreamy
Lavender · Vanilla · Jasmine

A signature trio — soothing lavender, dreamy jasmine, sweet vanilla. The ultimate wind-down scent.

06
Tropical Kiss
Juicy Mango · Pineapple

Vibrant and sun-drenched. A burst of tropical joy that transforms any room into a luminous escape.

07
Citrus Burst
Orange · Tangerine

Fresh and energising. Bright citrus cuts through the air and uplifts any space with clean, zesty radiance.

08
Romantic Bloom
Rose · Vanilla

Timeless and tender. The classic rose petal scent softened by creamy vanilla — romantic and beautiful.

09
Sensual Night
Oud · Jasmine · Rose

Mysterious and alluring. A complex floral-oud story that deepens through the evening — unforgettable.

10
Gourmet Delight
Chocolate · Vanilla · Strawberry

A fragrant dessert. Sweet, layered, and utterly irresistible — the most indulgent of our gourmand range.
